Uncertainty in Machine Learning. Usually, uncertainty regarding the prediction of a model is disentangled into aleatoric and epistemic factors ualea and uepi, respectively. The former encompasses irreducible sources of uncertainty like measurement noise and inherent ambiguities. The latter is commonly defined as the no…
